emails.subject: e prime
emails.body: e prime Regarding the guaranties, I am confused on the amount you want me to write for Corp. $30 or 20? Please let me know. Thanks! Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 Debra.Perlingiere@enron.com 713-853-7658 713-646-3490 Fax

emails.subject: RE: e prime
emails.body: RE: e prime Debra We will provide a $30 MM gty. from Enron Corp. for Enron North America's trading with e prime Energy Marketing, Inc. ENA gets a $25 MM collateral threshold. Please let me know if you have any other questions. Thanks, JRW To: Williams, Jason R (Credit)
